heading: Organization of a government pursuant to a constitution
label: 731b Organization of a government pursuant to a constitution
text: Fully recognizing the principle of government by consent, sections 731b to 731e of this title are now adopted in the nature of a compact so that the people of Puerto Rico may organize a government pursuant to a constitution of their own adoption.
notes: CodificationSection was not enacted as part of the Puerto Rican Federal Relations Act which comprises this chapter.
Repeals, , provided that:Act July 3, 1950, ch. 446, § 664 Stat. 320“All laws or parts of laws inconsistent with this Act [enacting sections 731b to 731e of this title] are hereby repealed.”
